data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for QR code scanning.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the QR code scanning functionality, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this capability. While the linked use case mentions the need for QR code scanning, there are no concrete details or evidence to support that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of QR code scanning functionality being implemented or operational.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify QR code scanning functionality.
